body:
* `IntegratorWithDiagnostics` was reading
`integrator.callback.continuous_callbacks` and passing it to the 2-arg `CallbackSet(continuous, discrete)`constructor. The next release of CTS will only supports discrete callbacks; the `continuous_callbacks` field is a backward-compat struct.

* Use the `CallbackSet(cbs...)` constructor with only `discrete_callbacks`, so CTS can remove the compat field.

title: Make ClimaTimestepper callbacks compatible with upcoming new version
